UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SUKHDEVJI PATEL'S MOTION TO CLAIM ATTORNEY FEES DENIED. "A PARTY WHO PARTIALLY PREVAILS ON AN ANTI-SLAPP MOTION MUST GENERALLY BE CONSIDERED A PREVAILING PARTY UNLESS THE RESULTS OF THE MOTION WERE SO INSIGNIFICANT THAT THE PARTY DID NOT ACHIEVE ANY PRACTICAL BENEFIT FROM BRINGING THE MOTION." MANN V. QUALITY OLD TIME SERV., INC. (2006)139 CAL. APP. 4TH 328, 340. THE ONLY CAUSE OF ACTION STRICKEN PURSUANT TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION WAS FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. CONTRARY TO DEFENDANT'S ARGUMENT TIN REPLY, THAT THE SCOPE OF LITIGATION WAS NARROWED BECAUSE THE ISSUE OF "WHETHER DEFENDANT FORFEITS THE RIGHT TO SAID TAXES WAS REMOVED FROM THE CASE" (REPLY 4:16-18), DEFENDANT CONCEDES IN HIS MOVING PAPERS FOR MOTION TO STRIKE THAT DEFENDANT'S LIABILITY, I.E. WHETHER DEFENDANT HAS TO PAY TAXES CAN BE RESOLVED BY THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT. (ANTI-SLAPP MOTION 12:24-27). THEREFORE, NET RESULT REMAINS THE SAME, SPECIFICALLY, WHETHER DEFENDANT HAD TO PAY TAXES WHEN THEY WERE DEMANDED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A JAMES ROBERTSON, CLERK K. LIU, NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Petition And Petition To Consolidate Arbitration With Case # 643613
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Andres Sanchez of M C Hall Associates (415-512-9865) appear for defendant Sukhdevji D. Pagtel opposing party. No other appearance.

Discussion - Tentative rling is adopted. PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED AYESH's Petition To Consolidate Arbitration With Case # 643613 is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff may raise the issue of coordination/consolidation with the arbitrator. Order signed in open court. Judge A James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Claim Attorney Fees
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances, Atty. Andres Sanchez of M C Hall Associates (415-512-9865) appear for defendant Sukhdevji D. Pagtel opposing party. No other appearance.

Discussion - Tentative rling is adopted. DEFENDANT SUKHDEVJI PATEL's Motion To Claim Attorney Fees DENIED. "A party who partially prevails on an anti-SLAPP motion must generally be considered a prevailing party unless the results of the motion were so insignificant that the party did not achieve any practical benefit from bringing the motion." Mann v. Quality Old Time Serv., Inc. (2006)139 Cal. App. 4th 328, 340. The only cause of action stricken pursuant to Defendant's motion was for declaratory relief. Contrary to Defendant's argument tin Reply, that the scope of litigation was narrowed because the issue of "whether Defendant forfeits the right to said taxes was removed from the case" (Reply 4:16-18), Defendant concedes in his moving papers for Motion to strike that defendant's liability, i.e. whether defendant has to pay taxes can be resolved by the cause of action for breach of contract. (Anti-SLAPP Motion 12:24-27). Therefore, net result remains the same, specifically, whether Defendant had to pay taxes when they were demanded. Order signed in open court. Judge A James Robertson, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
